drum_tuning_protocol.kick: Root note of the scale (e.g., F1 at 43.65Hz)
drum_tuning_protocol.snare: Perfect Fifth or Fourth relative to Root (e.g., C2 or Bb1)
drum_tuning_protocol.percussion: Tied to specific scale degrees (Phrygian-b2 for 'The Bite')
drum_tuning_protocol.rule: Always check tuning after applying Bitcrush or Distortion.
